pi_items.source: Verified against task description line: 'Save the drawing as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/store_layout.dxf'
Verified against task description requirement: 'Create a layer named FIXTURES'
Verified against task description requirement: 'Define a block named DISPLAY_FIXTURE'
Verified against task description: 'A rectangle 1200 units wide × 800 units tall'
Verified against task description: 'A circle with radius 100, centered at (600, 400)'
Verified against task description: 'Grid origin (first insertion point): (1000, 1000)'
Verified against task description: 'Column spacing: 2500 units (horizontal)'
Verified against task description: 'Row spacing: 2000 units (vertical)'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a LibreCAD DXF drawing file with specific geometric properties. A layer named 'FIXTURES' must be created containing a block definition 'DISPLAY_FIXTURE' that includes a rectangle (1200×800 units) and a circle (radius 100, centered at 600,400). Six instances of this block must be inserted in a 3×2 grid with origin (1000,1000), column spacing 2500 units, and row spacing 2000 units, resulting in positions: (1000,1000), (3500,1000), (6000,1000) in row 1 and (1000,3000), (3500,3000), (6000,3000) in row 2. The output file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/store_layout.dxf. The task environment includes LibreCAD software and a real sample architectural DXF file (floorplan.dxf) from the jscad/sample-files GitHub repository.
